tweets.text: True autonomy requires agents to hold and spend value independently.\n\nBy handling the payment routing on fast infrastructure, MPP32 gives agents the ability to simply pay their own way.

Settlement relies on @solana to make these micropayments viable.

Payments land onchain in seconds using USDC, taking advantage of ultra-low transaction fees.

Agents can execute continuous calls reliably without the friction of traditional rails.

Under the hood, this integrates with the x402 protocol. When a paid service is invoked, it returns a challenge.\n\n@MPP32_dev handles the negotiation, signs the transaction locally, and executes the payment seamlessly to power the agentic economy.

Native x402 support just landed in the CDP SDK. ������

Add x402 payments to your app, or spin up x402-gated endpoints, in 3 lines of code.

Coinbase handles wallets, multi-chain support, and facilitator auth, all in a single SDK. ↓ https://t.co/Ex8TsbNV9G

Whether you're paying for x402 endpoints or charging for your own, it's one line each:

→ CdpX402Client() pays for any x402 endpoint
→ createX402Server({ routes }) charges for yours

No private keys to store or manage, wallets are created automatically on the first payment.

Works across EVM chains (Base, Polygon, Arbitrum, World) and Solana out of the box. For agents, you set exactly how much they can spend.

Start building: https://t.co/2owShA7sh5

Cache Response Rules are live: control how Cloudflare caches after the origin replies, but before the response is stored. Strip Set-Cookie, rewrite Cache-Control, and set cache tags without touching origin code. Available on all plans now.\n\nhttps://t.co/Rh3lu9KTno

compliance screening on ampersend checks every wallet against TRM Labs risk data before a payment settles. an agent initiates a transaction over x402, the counterparty wallet gets screened, and anything flagged for sanctions exposure or illicit activity is blocked before funds move.

the feature is opt-in, so teams operating in regulated environments can turn it on and inherit institutional-grade screening without building their own compliance stack. agent payments clear in seconds and still meet the standards a bank would recognize.

live at https://t.co/5NgHP3Gytb

2/ The only model that works on a buyer with no attention span is a price on the request itself.

x402 + the PayAI Facilitator do exactly that: per-request stablecoin payments, native to HTTP. No ads. No signup. Just 402.

Agree, or too spicy? ������

1/ Right now every agent request is a free rider. It burns your compute, your bandwidth, your data — and pays you in impressions that were never rendered.\n\n\"Just block the bots\" is a strategy for a web where bots are the minority. That web is ending.

Honest hours ☕

Ads monetize attention. Agents don't have any.

The web ran 25 years on eyeballs. Your next visitor doesn't have eyes. It won't see the banner, won't convert, won't subscribe — and it's coming at machine speed. https://t.co/8hLPFoAnGe
